title: Nature's Carpet
description: Giving your grass this extra feel of nature!
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/143cc681887f656ac0bcf2588d87376a0e2fe34b_0.webp)

Transform your world with vibrant, nature-inspired textures! 

This pack overlays four distinct colors of flowers (red, pink, yellow, and white) and unique rock formations onto grass blocks,
bringing the natural beauty of the outdoors right to your feet. 
Whether you're building in lush forests or peaceful gardens, 
Nature's Carpet adds that extra layer of life and detail to your environment, 
making every landscape feel more alive and immersive.
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
